title: <div>Demonstrates accurate and appropriate use of punctuation marks (periods, qu
content:
Demonstrates accurate and appropriate use of punctuation marks (periods, question marks, exclamation points) in and after sentences.
5 pts
Full Credit
Fewer than 2 punctuation errors
0 pts
No Credit
More than 2 punctuation errors
5 pts
Total Points: 100

Week 2 | Quiz

Week 2: Grammar Concepts
Instructions
Due by the end of the week.

This 10-question quiz covers the following from Introduction to Writing:

Chapter 12 Sections 5 & 6
Chapter 14 Section 4
Select the "Take the Quiz" button to complete this 20-question quiz on the grammar concepts covered in this module.

Please only attempt the quiz after completing the weekly readings, lectures, and assignments. TWO attempts are provided for the quiz, questions are randomized in each attempt, and the highest score will be awarded in the grade book. The exam is timed, you are allowed 2 minutes per question.

Time for Completion
You have 20 minutes to complete each attempt.
